text: Entering the space, I am struck by a sense of anticipation and curiosity, as if about to witness the merging of intellect and design. The modern architecture feels cold yet inviting, challenging me to reflect on the boundaries between observer and participant. In the next area, surrounded by vibrant displays about research and innovation, I feel inspired and slightly overwhelmed—an eager student in a shrine of ideas, pondering the endless interplay between knowledge, progress, and my own smallness within it.
